description: User selects travel dates (March 20 to March 22) in the calendar modal
frame_description: The user interacts with the date picker, hovering over various dates before finalizing the selection of March 20th and 22nd.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected travel dates
frame_description: The 'Done' button shows a visual click state as the user confirms their selection.

description: The travel dates modal closes and the main search form is updated with the selected dates
frame_description: The modal disappears and the search bar now displays 'Fri, 20 Mar - Sun, 22 Mar'.
